system.notes:
U.S. armed-forces powered armor (game rules in Maximum Metal; stats printed in Home of the Brave).

Manufacturer: Tracker/GE. Chassis: Highwayman, STR 35. Chassis weight: 180 kg. Capacity/carry: 1750 kg / 525 kg. Reflexes: High-Boost Reflexes. SIB/DFB: +1/+2. Punch 4D10, Kick 6D10, Crush 5D10. Toughness mod: -9. Trooper size: 115 kg. Total weight: 934 kg. Total cost: 137,000 eb.

Per-limb armor: all locations SP 65. Main/loadout: 25mm autocannon (SP 25 / SDP 30 / 90 kg); amphibious swimmer unit (SP 25 / SDP 60); sonar; 40mm auto grenade launcher; 7.65mm LMG.

The per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout are printed as an interleaved grid; only cleanly readable cells are transcribed here. See Home of the Brave p.91 image for the complete grid.

needsEyes: Per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout: printed grid is column-interleaved in the text layer; not transcribed. Read from Home of the Brave p.91 image.
